Digital-Twin State or Mechanism: Mission definition; target output; MIG intensity
Observable Operational Data: Approved service objectives; stakeholder commitments; observed target attainment
Calibration Method: Stakeholder workshops and retrospective target estimation
Validation Criterion: Construct coverage and out-of-sample mission-achievement error
Claim Enabled: The twin represents heterogeneous stakeholder objectives

Digital-Twin State or Mechanism: VOMR resource account; replenishment; capacity constraint
Observable Operational Data: Inventory; staff hours; equipment availability; budget; service capacity
Current Synthetic Implementation: Per-step resource replenishment and nonnegative feasibility constraint
Calibration Method: State estimation from inventory and capacity records
Validation Criterion: Resource-balance error and zero overdraft violations

Observable Operational Data: Meals produced and served; completed services; compliance actions
Calibration Method: Fit transformation coefficients to operational input-output pairs
Validation Criterion: Output trajectory error by stakeholder and time window

Digital-Twin State or Mechanism: VOMR value account; value and cost coefficients
Observable Operational Data: Revenue; cost; satisfaction; welfare; compliance and environmental value proxies
Calibration Method: Financial records plus stakeholder-validated nonfinancial scales
Validation Criterion: Residual error and sensitivity to value assumptions
Claim Enabled: The twin compares encoded value consequences

Observable Operational Data: Transactions; services; information messages; payments; waste and emission observations

Digital-Twin State or Mechanism: MIG proposal; coordinated intensity; executed intensity

Claim Enabled: The twin captures time-varying mission commitment

Digital-Twin State or Mechanism: Scenario state and market availability modifiers
